creator: sobomax@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

It's not a problem, but "feature". The dependency was intentianally omitted 
because fetchmailconf is viewed as addon. This has been done to prevent users 
w/o X11 from installing X11/python and Tk just to run this script. 

The more "right" solution, though, whould be to create new port, which will 
install just fetchmailconf and will depend on Python/Tk. Please feel free to 
create such port and use send-pr to submit it. 

Thanks!
